UK = Unknown CHAR 2 x x
M0710_PR_FEEDING (M0710) Prior Feeding/Eating Prior ability to feed self. 00 = Able to independently feed self
01 = Able to feed self independently but requires: (a) meal set-up; OR (b) intermittent assistance or supervision from another person; OR (c) a liquid, pureed or ground meat diet
02 = Unable to feed self and must be assisted or supervised throughout the meal/snack
03 = Able to take in nutrients orally and receives supplemental nutrients
